title: Texture of Paul90317's Datapacks
description: add the textures of custom items in my data packs.
body:
![custom items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/G4PdFL69/images/f2e26bbfb274f565e2ee5b64bc2041b66971d121.png)  
This is the resource pack of my data packs.  
This resource pack adds the textures of custom items in my data packs.  
Only the people who want to see the texture of my data packs need to install this resource pack.  
These are the data packs that require this resource pack.
* [upgradable backpack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/upgradable-backpack)
* [enderite upgrade](https://modrinth.com/datapack/enderite-upgrade)
* [diamond upgrade](https://modrinth.com/datapack/diamond-upgrade)
* [disenchanting book](https://modrinth.com/datapack/disenchanting-book)
